creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
I don't know what and where was fixed but something was probably forgotten. I see this error on FreeBSD 12.3-RELEASE-p10 amd64 GENERIC machine building update to 12.4-RELEASE

# make installkernel DESTDIR=/vol0/12.4-RELEASE_amd64
kldxref: /vol0/12.4-RELEASE_amd64/boot/kernel/kernel: too many segments
